comments: AccessLumens currently supports automated WCAG-based website evaluation, multi-page crawling, evidence-backed reporting, and accessibility benchmarking. The platform focuses on helping teams prioritize remediation efforts by highlighting issues with the greatest potential user impact and compliance risk.
features: AccessLumens evaluates website accessibility through automated WCAG testing, multi-page website crawling, accessibility benchmarking, keyboard experience analysis, and evidence-based reporting. It helps teams identify, prioritize, and remediate accessibility issues with actionable insights and compliance-focused guidance.
title: AccessLumens
